seoTitle: Glen Huntly vs Glen Iris — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Huntly and Glen Iris. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Huntly vs Glen Iris: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Huntly and Glen Iris.
heading: Glen Huntly vs Glen Iris — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Huntly, Victoria and Glen Iris, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Iris has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Glen Huntly (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Huntly or Glen Iris safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Huntly has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Glen Iris scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Huntly scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Iris scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Huntly or Glen Iris?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Iris has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
